flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tusculum University fell 37% between 2021 and 2024 (40.6% → 25.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tusculum University fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 785).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Tusculum University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (903 vs 1.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tusculum University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.5k → $29.2k).
